zh.lifeSummary: Christina Seton是Alan Seton de Wyntown和Margaret Seton的女兒，出生。她於1361年與Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1402年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Christina Seton是Alan Seton de Wyntown和Margaret Seton的女儿，出生。她于1361年与Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March在苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1402年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: Christina Seton was born as the daughter of Alan Seton de Wyntown and Margaret Seton. She married Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March in 1361, in Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1402.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina SetonはAlan Seton de WyntownとMargaret Setonの娘として生まれた。1361年にスコットランドミドロスアンでSir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of Marchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1402年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Seton(은)는 Alan Seton de Wyntown(와)과 Margaret Seton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1361년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1402년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Christina Seton родилась. Её родителей звали Alan Seton de Wyntown и Margaret Seton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March в 1361 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1402 г.
